specs.section_8: Yes. Features include:16MP ultra–wide camera for photos & recordingChatGPT integration for voice interaction and report displayMultitasking with up to 3 floating screens3DoF smart ring for intuitive controlSleek flat-lens design for portability
specs.section_9: Yes, the INMO Air3 features spatial computing capabilities.It is powered by a Qualcomm Snapdragon spatial computing processor and runs the IMOS 3.0 spatial operating system.These features enable immersive AR experiences such as:36° virtual field of view display3DoF screen hoveringMulti-screen interactionInteraction via smart ringThese glasses are designed to seamlessly integrate digital content with your real-world environment.
specs.section_10: Enhanced Comfort & DurabilityNose Pad:Features adual-pad nose designfor superior comfort.Material:Built withupgraded PA material, offering improved robustness compared to the Chinese version's ABS+PC.Superior PerformanceHeat Dissipation:Integrates an advanced cooling system with bothGraphene and superconductive copperfor optimal heat management, whereas the Chinese version uses Graphene only.Full Software EcosystemSoftware:ComesGMS certifiedand offersfull Google support, providing a seamless and
specs.section_11: Yes, we have tested hand tracking solution with band, and it works perfect in INMO Air3. We will sell the wristband as a separate accessory later.You can watch the short video to view it:https://youtube.com/shorts/5MiiHLTxQqI?si=-_jc5zgR3MC61IQA
specs.section_12: Shipping costs for the INMO AIR3 arecalculated based on your delivery location and the shipping method you selectduring the checkout process. We strive to offer competitive rates and various options (e.g., standard, expedited) to meet your needs. All available shipping options and their associated costs will be clearly displayed before you finalize your purchase. We do not offer completely free worldwide shipping as a standard, but occasionally run promotions, which will be clearly advertised.Ou
specs.section_13: After-Sales Services:For a valid warranty claim, proof of purchase and this warranty certificate are required.Within 30 days from the receipt date:For a product with a defect in materials or workmanship, you can choose a refund, replacement, or repair.This policy does not cover damage caused by misuse or accidental damage.After 30 days and within the warranty period:For a product with a defect in materials or workmanship, we will provide a free repair or replacement, at our discretion.Exclusions
